t.t-if: doc.partner_id.street or doc.partner_id.street2 or doc.partner_id.city or doc.partner_id.state_id or doc.partner_id.zip or doc.partner_id.country_id
doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id
doc.partner_id.street or doc.partner_id.street2 or doc.partner_id.city or doc.partner_id.state_id or doc.partner_id.zip or doc.partner_id.country_id
doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id
doc.partner_id.street or doc.partner_id.street2 or doc.partner_id.city or doc.partner_id.state_id or doc.partner_id.zip or doc.partner_id.country_id
doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id
not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.show_image and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom
not res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.show_image and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom
not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image
not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and res_config.show_image

t.t-elif: not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image
not res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom and res_config.show_image

not res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image
not res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and res_config.show_image
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image
res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom and res_config.show_image

res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image
not res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and not res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image

res_config.ks_product_desc and res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image

res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and not res_config.show_image and not res_config.show_uom
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and not res_config.show_image
res_config.ks_product_desc and not res_config.ks_discount and res_config.ks_show_taxes and res_config.show_uom and res_config.show_image

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if line.display_type == 'line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: '%' if line.discount_type == 'percent' else ('$' if line.discount_type == 'fixed' else '')

t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

t.t-elif: res_config.ks_record_status == 'sale_order'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'purchase_order'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'RFQ'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'payment'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'picking'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'delivery'

div.t-if: res_config.customer_sign and not res_config.ks_show_signature and doc.signed_by

t.t-elif: res_config.ks_record_status == 'Invoice'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'purchase_order'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'RFQ'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'RFQ'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'payment'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'picking'
res_config.ks_record_status == 'delivery'
